requests.name: List Universities
requests.notes: List universities with optional search, state filter, and pagination. Returns active_listing_count per university. No auth required.

requests.name: Get University Detail
requests.notes: Get university by slug with market_data (HUD FMR rent by bedroom count). No auth required.

requests.name: Get Nearby Listings
requests.notes: Get active approved listings within ~3 miles of the university. No auth required.
